name: edge-case
task: Add error handling and rate limiting to the polymarket client. The CLOB API has rate limits of ~100 requests/minute for public endpoints. Implement exponential backoff and a request queue so we don't get throttled when users make rapid queries about multiple markets.
assertions: Response implements exponential backoff with increasing delay between retries, not a fixed retry interval
Response enforces a rate limit of approximately 100 requests per minute for public (unauthenticated) endpoints
Response implements a request queue or throttling mechanism that serializes or batches concurrent requests
Response distinguishes between public endpoint rate limits (~100/min) and authenticated endpoint rate limits (~1000/min)
Response logs errors with context before re-throwing, not silently swallowing API failures
